title: Use of income or surplus
doc_html:
§484.  Use of income or surplus

All income, surplus, and payments received by a local housing authority, or to which such authority shall become entitled, shall be used for carrying out the purposes of this Chapter.

Acts 1997, No. 1188, §1.
